issues.title: Spring-AI 1.0.0-M7 has been released while Ollama spring boot starter hasn't been updated to 1.0.0-M7 yet
issues.body:
**Expected Behavior**

The `spring-ai-ollama-spring-boot-starter` should be available in version `1.0.0-M7` to align with the latest Spring AI release.

**Current Behavior**

Spring AI is at version `1.0.0-M7` (https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-ai/releases/tag/v1.0.0-M7), but the latest `spring-ai-ollama-spring-boot-starter` is still `1.0.0-M6` (https://mvnrepository.com/artifact/org.springframework.ai/spring-ai-ollama-spring-boot-starter/1.0.0-M6). This creates a version mismatch when upgrading.

![Image](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/fa31b180-e8e3-4c6c-8027-3515a64b8991)

**Context**

This version mismatch prevents smooth upgrades and requires manual dependency overrides. A matching `M7` release for the starter would resolve this.

comments.body:
spring-ai-ollama-spring-boot-starter has been renamed spring-ai-starter-model-ollama, which is present on [maven central here](https://central.sonatype.com/artifact/org.springframework.ai/spring-ai-starter-model-ollama/versions).

This is mentioned in the release notes here:
https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-ai/blob/v1.0.0-M7/spring-ai-docs/src/main/antora/modules/ROOT/pages/upgrade-notes.adoc#common-changes-across-versions
Thank you for sharing this documentation. It’s incredibly helpful.
